arts.ttl: Huge band coming to bet365 Stadium for first ever Stoke-on-Trent gig
arts.sum: Boyzlife will take to the stage as part of series of summer events at the Stoke City ground's new outdoor fan zone, the Boothen Quarter. Both bands will be supported by acts local to the Stoke-on-Trent area; John Dhali and a 90s/00s set from DJ Lauren May preceding Boyzlife and Lissy Taylor and Foarn opening the show for the Twang.
